items.claim: Hussein has been submitted multiple times in his career.
items.quote: He's been submitted a handful of times.

items.claim: Brenson Hiro has one of the worst takedown defenses in the UFC at around 20%.
items.quote: He barely has one of the worst takedown defenses, not only in the light heavyweight division, but the entire UFC. It's like 20%.

items.claim: Mamemed Tuchalov possesses elite ground and pound.
items.quote: Tuchalov can wrestle. He does have elite ground and pound

items.claim: Sam Patterson will bounce back after a poor performance in his last fight against MVP.
items.quote: Patterson is going to bounce back after he completely crapped his pants in his last fight against MVP.

items.claim: Santiago Ponzanibio is completely washed and extremely chinny at 39 years old.
items.quote: Santiago Ponzanibio, who's 39 years old, who I think is just completely washed, extremely chinny.

items.claim: Santiago Ponzanibio has taken a ton of damage and been in wars over his last five fights.
items.quote: He's taken a ton of damage these last five fights. He's been in some wars these last five fights.

items.claim: Sam Patterson has a ton of power in his hands and an elite submission game.
items.quote: Patterson has a ton of power in his hands, and obviously an elite submission game as well.
